name: Noodles with Ricotta and Walnuts
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Half-and-half or Milk or Pasta Water
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of water to boil and add salt to taste. If using dried pasta, add it at this time; if using fresh, wait until the sauce ingredients are prepared.
2. In a bowl or container for serving, roughly mix the ricotta cheese, butter, walnut oil, 1/4 cup walnuts, grated Parmesan cheese, half-and-half (or milk), herbs (chives and/or chervil or parsley), salt, and pepper.
3. Transfer the mixture to a wide skillet and gently warm over low heat until heated through.
4. Cook and drain the pasta according to package instructions, then add it directly to the pan with the ricotta mixture.
5. Toss everything together well and place in the heated serving bowl or on plates.
6. Scatter remaining walnuts over the pasta and sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese and plenty of freshly ground pepper before serving.
